channel.title: pivotal — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by pivotal (pivotal).

item.title: CVE-2020-5428 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Possibility of SQL Injection in Spring Cloud Task Execution Sorting Query
item.description: In applications using Spring Cloud Task 2.2.4.RELEASE and below, may be vulnerable to SQL injection when exercising certain lookup queries in the TaskExplorer.

item.title: CVE-2020-5427 · 5.7 MEDIUM — Possibility of SQL Injection in Spring Cloud Data Flow Task Execution Sorting Query
item.description: In Spring Cloud Data Flow, versions 2.6.x prior to 2.6.5, versions 2.5.x prior 2.5.4, an application is vulnerable to SQL injection when requesting task execution.

item.title: CVE-2020-5423 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Cloud Controller is vulnerable to denial of service via YAML parsing
item.description: CAPI (Cloud Controller) versions prior to 1.101.0 are vulnerable to a denial-of-service attack in which an unauthenticated malicious attacker can send specially-crafted YAML files to certain endpoints, causing the YAML parser to consume excessive CPU…

item.title: CVE-2020-5426 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Scheduler for TAS can transmit privileged UAA token in plaintext
item.description: Scheduler for TAS prior to version 1.4.0 was permitting plaintext transmission of UAA client token by sending it over a non-TLS connection. This also depended on the configuration of the MySQL server which is used to cache a UAA client token used by…

item.title: CVE-2020-5425 · 7.5 HIGH — User Impersonation possible in Tanzu SSO
item.description: Single Sign-On for Vmware Tanzu all versions prior to 1.11.3 ,1.12.x versions prior to 1.12.4 and 1.13.x prior to 1.13.1 are vulnerable to user impersonation attack.If two users are logged in to the SSO operator dashboard at the same time, with the s…

item.title: CVE-2020-5422 — UAA password may appear in BOSH System Metrics Server process arguments
item.description: BOSH System Metrics Server releases prior to 0.1.0 exposed the UAA password as a flag to a process running on the BOSH director. It exposed the password to any user or process with access to the same VM (through ps or looking at process details).

item.title: CVE-2020-5421 · 8.7 HIGH — RFD Protection Bypass via jsessionid
item.description: In Spring Framework versions 5.2.0 - 5.2.8, 5.1.0 - 5.1.17, 5.0.0 - 5.0.18, 4.3.0 - 4.3.28, and older unsupported versions, the protections against RFD attacks from CVE-2015-5211 may be bypassed depending on the browser used through the use of a jses…

item.title: CVE-2020-5420 · 7.7 HIGH — Gorouter is vulnerable to DoS attack via invalid HTTP responses
item.description: Cloud Foundry Routing (Gorouter) versions prior to 0.206.0 allow a malicious developer with "cf push" access to cause denial-of-service to the CF cluster by pushing an app that returns specially crafted HTTP responses that crash the Gorouters.

item.title: CVE-2020-5418 · 3.1 LOW — Cloud Controller allows users with no roles to list droplets
item.description: Cloud Foundry CAPI (Cloud Controller) versions prior to 1.98.0 allow authenticated users having only the "cloud_controller.read" scope, but no roles in any spaces, to list all droplets in all spaces (whereas they should see none).

item.title: CVE-2020-5419 · 6.7 MEDIUM — RabbitMQ arbitrary code execution using local binary planting
item.description: RabbitMQ versions 3.8.x prior to 3.8.7 are prone to a Windows-specific binary planting security vulnerability that allows for arbitrary code execution. An attacker with write privileges to the RabbitMQ installation directory and local access on Windo…

item.title: CVE-2020-5417 · 8.5 HIGH — Cloud Controller may allow developers to claim sensitive routes
item.description: Cloud Foundry CAPI (Cloud Controller), versions prior to 1.97.0, when used in a deployment where an app domain is also the system domain (which is true in the default CF Deployment manifest), were vulnerable to developers maliciously or accidentally…

item.title: CVE-2020-5416 · 7.7 HIGH — CF clusters with NGINX in front of them may be vulnerable to DoS
item.description: Cloud Foundry Routing (Gorouter), versions prior to 0.204.0, when used in a deployment with NGINX reverse proxies in front of the Gorouters, is potentially vulnerable to denial-of-service attacks in which an unauthenticated malicious attacker can sen…

item.title: CVE-2020-5415 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Concourse's GitLab auth allows impersonation
item.description: Concourse, versions prior to 6.3.1 and 6.4.1, in installations which use the GitLab auth connector, is vulnerable to identity spoofing by way of configuring a GitLab account with the same full name as another user who is granted access to a Concourse…

item.title: CVE-2020-5412 — Hystrix Dashboard Proxy In spring-cloud-netflix-hystrix-dashboard
item.description: Spring Cloud Netflix, versions 2.2.x prior to 2.2.4, versions 2.1.x prior to 2.1.6, and older unsupported versions allow applications to use the Hystrix Dashboard proxy.stream endpoint to make requests to any server reachable by the server hosting th…

item.title: CVE-2020-5414 · 5.7 MEDIUM — App Autoscaler logs credentials
item.description: VMware Tanzu Application Service for VMs (2.7.x versions prior to 2.7.19, 2.8.x versions prior to 2.8.13, and 2.9.x versions prior to 2.9.7) contains an App Autoscaler that logs the UAA admin password. This credential is redacted on VMware Tanzu Oper…

item.title: CVE-2020-5413 — Kryo Configuration Allows Code Execution with Unknown "Serialization Gadgets"
item.description: Spring Integration framework provides Kryo Codec implementations as an alternative for Java (de)serialization. When Kryo is configured with default options, all unregistered classes are resolved on demand. This leads to the "deserialization gadgets"…

item.title: CVE-2020-5396 — JMX Insecure Default Configuration in GemFire
item.description: VMware GemFire versions prior to 9.10.0, 9.9.2, 9.8.7, and 9.7.6, and VMware Tanzu GemFire for VMs versions prior to 1.11.1 and 1.10.2, when deployed without a SecurityManager, contain a JMX service available which contains an insecure default config…

item.title: CVE-2019-11286 · 9 CRITICAL — JMX Credential Deserialization in GemFire
item.description: VMware GemFire versions prior to 9.10.0, 9.9.1, 9.8.5, and 9.7.5, and VMware Tanzu GemFire for VMs versions prior to 1.11.0, 1.10.1, 1.9.2, and 1.8.2, contain a JMX service available to the network which does not properly restrict input. A remote aut…

item.title: CVE-2020-5411 — Jackson Configuration Allows Code Execution with Unknown "Serialization Gadgets"
item.description: When configured to enable default typing, Jackson contained a deserialization vulnerability that could lead to arbitrary code execution. Jackson fixed this vulnerability by blacklisting known "deserialization gadgets". Spring Batch configures Jackson…

item.title: CVE-2020-5410 · 7.5 HIGH 💥 🌩️ — Directory Traversal with spring-cloud-config-server
item.description: Spring Cloud Config, versions 2.2.x prior to 2.2.3, versions 2.1.x prior to 2.1.9, and older unsupported versions allow applications to serve arbitrary configuration files through the spring-cloud-config-server module. A malicious user, or attacker,…

item.title: CVE-2020-5408 — Dictionary attack with Spring Security queryable text encryptor
item.description: Spring Security versions 5.3.x prior to 5.3.2, 5.2.x prior to 5.2.4, 5.1.x prior to 5.1.10, 5.0.x prior to 5.0.16 and 4.2.x prior to 4.2.16 use a fixed null initialization vector with CBC Mode in the implementation of the queryable text encryptor. A…

item.title: CVE-2020-5409 · 7.6 HIGH 🌩️ — Concourse Open Redirect in the /sky/login endpoint
item.description: Pivotal Concourse, most versions prior to 6.0.0, allows redirects to untrusted websites in its login flow. A remote unauthenticated attacker could convince a user to click on a link using the OAuth redirect link with an untrusted website and gain acc…

item.title: CVE-2020-5407 — Signature Wrapping Vulnerability with spring-security-saml2-service-provider
item.description: Spring Security versions 5.2.x prior to 5.2.4 and 5.3.x prior to 5.3.2 contain a signature wrapping vulnerability during SAML response validation. When using the spring-security-saml2-service-provider component, a malicious user can carefully modify…

item.title: CVE-2020-5406 — PCF Autoscaling logs its database credentials
item.description: VMware Tanzu Application Service for VMs, 2.6.x versions prior to 2.6.18, 2.7.x versions prior to 2.7.11, and 2.8.x versions prior to 2.8.5, includes a version of PCF Autoscaling that writes database connection properties to its log, including databa…

item.title: CVE-2020-5405 — Directory Traversal with spring-cloud-config-server
item.description: Spring Cloud Config, versions 2.2.x prior to 2.2.2, versions 2.1.x prior to 2.1.7, and older unsupported versions allow applications to serve arbitrary configuration files through the spring-cloud-config-server module. A malicious user, or attacker,…

item.title: CVE-2020-5403 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — DoS Via Malformed URL with Reactor Netty HTTP Server
item.description: Reactor Netty HttpServer, versions 0.9.3 and 0.9.4, is exposed to a URISyntaxException that causes the connection to be closed prematurely instead of producing a 400 response.

item.title: CVE-2020-5404 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Authentication Leak On Redirect With Reactor Netty HttpClient
item.description: The HttpClient from Reactor Netty, versions 0.9.x prior to 0.9.5, and versions 0.8.x prior to 0.8.16, may be used incorrectly, leading to a credentials leak during a redirect to a different domain. In order for this to happen, the HttpClient must hav…

item.title: CVE-2020-5402 · 8.8 HIGH 🌩️ — UAA fails to check the state parameter when authenticating with external IDPs
item.description: In Cloud Foundry UAA, versions prior to 74.14.0, a CSRF vulnerability exists due to the OAuth2 state parameter not being checked in the callback function when authenticating with external identity providers.

item.title: CVE-2020-5401 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Cloud Foundry GoRouter is vulnerable to cache poisoning
item.description: Cloud Foundry Routing Release, versions prior to 0.197.0, contains GoRouter, which allows malicious clients to send invalid headers, causing caching layers to reject subsequent legitimate clients trying to access the app.

item.title: CVE-2020-5400 · 8 HIGH — Cloud Controller logs environment variables from app manifests
item.description: Cloud Foundry Cloud Controller (CAPI), versions prior to 1.91.0, logs properties of background jobs when they are run, which may include sensitive information such as credentials if provided to the job. A malicious user with access to those logs may…

item.title: CVE-2020-5399 · 7.6 HIGH — CredHub does not properly enable TLS for MySQL database connections
item.description: Cloud Foundry CredHub, versions prior to 2.5.10, connects to a MySQL database without TLS even when configured to use TLS. A malicious user with access to the network between CredHub and its MySQL database may eavesdrop on database connections and th…

item.title: CVE-2019-11288 · 7.3 HIGH — tcServer JMX Socket Listener Registry Rebinding Local Privilege Escalation
item.description: In Pivotal tc Server, 3.x versions prior to 3.2.19 and 4.x versions prior to 4.0.10, and Pivotal tc Runtimes, 7.x versions prior to 7.0.99.B, 8.x versions prior to 8.5.47.A, and 9.x versions prior to 9.0.27.A, when a tc Runtime instance is configured…

item.title: CVE-2020-5397 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — CSRF Attack via CORS Preflight Requests with Spring MVC or Spring WebFlux
item.description: Spring Framework, versions 5.2.x prior to 5.2.3 are vulnerable to CSRF attacks through CORS preflight requests that target Spring MVC (spring-webmvc module) or Spring WebFlux (spring-webflux module) endpoints. Only non-authenticated endpoints are vul…

item.title: CVE-2020-5398 · 8 HIGH — RFD Attack via "Content-Disposition" Header Sourced from Request Input by Spring MVC or Spring WebFlux Application
item.description: In Spring Framework, versions 5.2.x prior to 5.2.3, versions 5.1.x prior to 5.1.13, and versions 5.0.x prior to 5.0.16, an application is vulnerable to a reflected file download (RFD) attack when it sets a "Content-Disposition" header in the response…

item.title: CVE-2019-11292 · 8.8 HIGH — Pivotal Ops Manager logs query parameters in tomcat access file
item.description: Pivotal Ops Manager, versions 2.4.x prior to 2.4.27, 2.5.x prior to 2.5.24, 2.6.x prior to 2.6.16, and 2.7.x prior to 2.7.5, logs all query parameters to tomcat’s access file. If the query parameters are used to provide authentication, ie. credential…

item.title: CVE-2019-11294 · 4.3 MEDIUM — CAPI leaks service broker URLs and GUIDs to space developers
item.description: Cloud Foundry Cloud Controller API (CAPI), version 1.88.0, allows space developers to list all global service brokers, including service broker URLs and GUIDs, which should only be accessible to admins.

item.title: CVE-2019-11293 · 8.8 HIGH — UAA logs all query parameters with debug logging level
item.description: Cloud Foundry UAA Release, versions prior to v74.10.0, when set to logging level DEBUG, logs client_secret credentials when sent as a query parameter. A remote authenticated malicious user could gain access to user credentials via the uaa.log file if…

item.title: CVE-2019-11290 · 8.8 HIGH — Cloud Foundry UAA logs query parameters in tomcat access file
item.description: Cloud Foundry UAA Release, versions prior to v74.8.0, logs all query parameters to tomcat’s access file. If the query parameters are used to provide authentication, ie. credentials, then they will be logged as well.

item.title: CVE-2019-11287 · 4.5 MEDIUM — RabbitMQ Web Management Plugin DoS via heap overflow
item.description: Pivotal RabbitMQ, versions 3.7.x prior to 3.7.21 and 3.8.x prior to 3.8.1, and RabbitMQ for Pivotal Platform, 1.16.x versions prior to 1.16.7 and 1.17.x versions prior to 1.17.4, contain a web management plugin that is vulnerable to a denial of servi…

item.title: CVE-2019-11291 · 3.1 LOW — RabbitMQ XSS attack via federation and shovel endpoints
item.description: Pivotal RabbitMQ, 3.7 versions prior to v3.7.20 and 3.8 version prior to v3.8.1, and RabbitMQ for PCF, 1.16.x versions prior to 1.16.7 and 1.17.x versions prior to 1.17.4, contain two endpoints, federation and shovel, which do not properly sanitize u…

item.title: CVE-2019-11289 · 8.6 HIGH 🌩️ — A forged route service request using an invalid nonce can cause the gorouter to panic and crash
item.description: Cloud Foundry Routing, all versions before 0.193.0, does not properly validate nonce input. A remote unauthenticated malicious user could forge an HTTP route service request using an invalid nonce that will cause the Gorouter to crash.

item.title: CVE-2019-11283 · 8.8 HIGH — Password leak in smbdriver logs
item.description: Cloud Foundry SMB Volume, versions prior to v2.0.3, accidentally outputs sensitive information to the logs. A remote user with access to the SMB Volume logs can discover the username and password for volumes that have been recently created, allowing…

item.title: CVE-2019-11282 · 4.3 MEDIUM — UAA is vulnerable to a Blind SCIM injection leading to information disclosure
item.description: Cloud Foundry UAA, versions prior to v74.3.0, contains an endpoint that is vulnerable to SCIM injection attack. A remote authenticated malicious user with scim.invite scope can craft a request with malicious content which can leak information about u…

item.title: CVE-2019-11284 · 6.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Reactor Netty authentication leak in redirects
item.description: Pivotal Reactor Netty, versions prior to 0.8.11, passes headers through redirects, including authorization ones. A remote unauthenticated malicious user may gain access to credentials for a different server than they have access to.

item.title: CVE-2019-11281 · 2.4 LOW — RabbitMQ XSS attack
item.description: Pivotal RabbitMQ, versions prior to v3.7.18, and RabbitMQ for PCF, versions 1.15.x prior to 1.15.13, versions 1.16.x prior to 1.16.6, and versions 1.17.x prior to 1.17.3, contain two components, the virtual host limits page, and the federation manage…

item.title: CVE-2019-11275 · 3.5 LOW — CSV Injection in usage report downloaded from Pivotal Application Manager
item.description: Pivotal Application Manager, versions 666.0.x prior to 666.0.36, versions 667.0.x prior to 667.0.22, versions 668.0.x prior to 668.0.21, versions 669.0.x prior to 669.0.13, and versions 670.0.x prior to 670.0.7, contain a vulnerability where a remote…

item.title: CVE-2019-11279 · 8.7 HIGH — Privilege Escalation via Scope Manipulation in UAA
item.description: CF UAA versions prior to 74.1.0 can request scopes for a client that shouldn't be allowed by submitting an array of requested scopes. A remote malicious user can escalate their own privileges to any scope, allowing them to take control of UAA and the…

item.title: CVE-2019-11278 · 8.7 HIGH — Privilege Escalation via Blind SCIM Injection in UAA
item.description: CF UAA versions prior to 74.1.0, allow external input to be directly queried against. A remote malicious user with 'client.write' and 'groups.update' can craft a SCIM query, which leaks information that allows an escalation of privileges, ultimately…

item.title: CVE-2019-11277 · 8.4 HIGH — Volume Services is vulnerable to an LDAP injection attack
item.description: Cloud Foundry NFS Volume Service, 1.7.x versions prior to 1.7.11 and 2.x versions prior to 2.3.0, is vulnerable to LDAP injection. A remote authenticated malicious space developer can potentially inject LDAP filters via service instance creation, fac…

item.title: CVE-2019-11280 · 8.8 HIGH — Privilege escalation through the invitations service
item.description: Pivotal Apps Manager, included in Pivotal Application Service versions 2.3.x prior to 2.3.18, 2.4.x prior to 2.4.14, 2.5.x prior to 2.5.10, and 2.6.x prior to 2.6.5, contains an invitations microservice which allows users to invite others to their or…
